hook: Who actually owns your therapy notes?
vo: In 2023, the US FTC ordered BetterHelp to pay 7.8 million dollars — for sharing users' sensitive mental-health data with Facebook and others for advertising. After promising it wouldn't.
That wasn't a criminal conviction. They settled. They denied wrongdoing.
The question stands though. When your data lives on someone else's platform, who does it really belong to?
On Faresay, therapists keep their own clients, set their own prices, and control their own data. Free to start. No commission.
onscreen_text: Your clients. Your data. Your prices.
cta: Your records, your clients, your data. That's the idea.
broll_notes: Close-up of a notebook closing, then a phone screen showing a simple clean app interface — no faces, no names visible. Slow, quiet shots. Natural light.
